sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value BITSTRING, num_val INT, str_val VARCHAR, timestamp_val TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, '101'::BITSTRING, 10, 'hello', TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00'), (2, '001'::BITSTRING, NULL, 'world', NULL), (3, NULL, 50, NULL, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-03 00:00:00');
SELECT min(xor(num_val, 5), value) FROM test_data GROUP BY value HAVING min(num_val) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (min(num_val) + 1) AS adjusted_min, xor(value, '110'::BITSTRING) AS xor_value FROM test_data WHERE num_val IS NOT NULL GROUP BY adjusted_min;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT min(num_val) FROM test_data WHERE str_val IS NULL) AS min_num FROM test_data WHERE xor(value, '111'::BITSTRING) IS NOT NULL;
WITH data_agg AS (SELECT value, min(num_val) AS min_number FROM test_data GROUP BY value) SELECT value, xor(value, '000'::BITSTRING) FROM data_agg WHERE min_number > 0;
SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE xor(value, (SELECT min(value) FROM test_data WHERE num_val IS NOT NULL)) = '010'::BITSTRING;
SELECT min(xor(num_val, str_val::BITSTRING::INT)) AS min_xor_result FROM test_data GROUP BY str_val HAVING min_xor_result IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test AS SELECT id, xor(num_val, 10) AS new_num_val FROM test_data WHERE num_val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT min(new_num_val) FROM temp_test WHERE new_num_val IS NOT NULL;
